text.message: Uh, excited to see how you get outa this start blue

yeah black wins this with devs

You take center and outproduce all, blue gonna be trading all his ore too cus his hand is eternally stuck

just a heads up so u dont waste roads
did blue get a mono or smth?
can we start thinking of blue as the leader now?
i dunno how black just gave that
Might be curtains now, wp blue with that starting pos
sry red, just wanted to make sure u not give nb to blue
dont worry i would have not given that to blue
i know, but to even mention nb at this stage is kinda sus

Ok so blue def on 9 with a mono
Idk why he’s hitting me lmao red is ur only comp blue
